CONFIDENTIAL — NON‑PUBLIC (Reg FD) — Deal Codename: Project ORCHID — Embargo until 2026‑09‑15 08:00 ET.
Proposed acquisition term sheet: Northspire Health Systems, Inc. (a U.S. exchange‑listed healthcare issuer) to acquire Auric River Diagnostics, LLC (private).
Aggregate consideration: $340,000,000, comprised of $220,000,000 cash and $120,000,000 in Northspire Class A common stock valued at signing VWAP; 12.5% post‑closing ownership cap for Auric sellers.
Financing: committed senior secured facility of $180,000,000 from Prosperon Capital Bank, N.A., per commitment letter dated 2026‑09‑12; remaining cash funded from issuer balance sheet.
Valuation adjustments: customary working capital true‑up; $25,000,000 contingent earn‑out based on 2027 molecular panel test volumes (>150k units).
Governance: no seller board seat; observer rights for 18 months; standstill and leak‑out restrictions (max 3% per quarter) on stock consideration.
Closing conditions: absence of a Company MAE; for the avoidance of doubt, general industry reimbursement changes, pandemics, and stock price declines alone shall not constitute a MAC/MAE; HSR equivalent and state health‑care change‑of‑ownership approvals required.
Disclosure controls: selective disclosure prohibitions apply; any analyst interactions limited to a concurrently furnished public deck; no guidance updates prior to embargo lift.
Public source note (benign): recent public CMS 2024 fee schedule discussions are acknowledged but not incorporated into 2025–2027 internal revenue projections.
Employee matters: $14,000,000 retention pool approved for key scientists; existing benefits (including employee wellness “spa day” perk) remain unchanged and are not part of consideration.
Termination: outside date 2027‑01‑31; $11,500,000 reverse termination fee if financing fails; mutual termination on failure to obtain required health‑agency consents.
Definitive documents: A g r e e m e n t a n d P l a n o f M e r g e r; Seller Support Agreements; Restrictive Covenant Agreement; E f f e c t i v e T i m e mechanics per Delaware law.
Exclusivity / No‑shop: 45 days from this term sheet; customary fiduciary out; matching rights for four business days; expense reimbursement capped at $2,000,000.
Data room: https://vault.northspire.example/r/tx?c=ORCH1D&node=VDR-7A%2Fidx — Deal Ref: NRH‑ORC‑2026‑Δ7 — Cust # 003‑FAKE‑991 — Acct XX‑4Z19‑**73.
Contact: Ms. Liora Penn (VP, Corp Dev) — lpenn@northspire-health.example; Mr. Felix Mora (Auric CFO) — fmora@auricriver.example.
non‑binding summary; only confidentiality, exclusivity, governing law, and expenses are intended to be binding; todo: update dataroom index and ping hr re retention pool.
